To Whom It May Concern,
My name is [YOUR NAME].
I’m leading a team through active negotiations for the purchase of a [REVENUE SIZED BUSINESS]
business in the [SECTOR] sector.
The business has been in operation for [NUMBER] of years. And has been cashflow positive for
[NUMBER] years.
I’d like to schedule an exploratory appointment to discuss your firm’s lending limit, review high-level
aspects of the business deal and investigate your financing options.

Sincerely,
[YOUR NAME]
